cascade_CSLSL_partial_4fold.note: reconstructed from per-fold val CSVs via geom_simple joint-best epoch; summary OOM'd so full_summary.json absent

parallel_championG: NOT OBTAINED — killed at fold 1 to protect the box from MPS OOM-reboot
blocker: MPS backend OOM at summary aggregation: 'other allocations 25.06 GiB' on a 24GB box (swap-oversubscribed; Chrome+Android emulator co-resident). FL is large (159,175 rows / 4703 regions). Cascade trained 4 folds then OOM'd; fold 5 + the matched champion comparand not obtained.
recommendation: Run FL CSLSL on CUDA (A40/H100) — its documented lane (BASELINE_A40: 'CSLSL @ FL ... the stable card for the longer run'). The M4 24GB is insufficient for FL CSLSL under typical desktop load.
